summary: Markets exhibit mixed sentiment today amid consolidation in crypto, a bullish rebound in oil, and caution in forex and stocks due to geopolitical tensions, FOMC uncertainty, and oil-driven risk aversion. Bitcoin hovers around $77K in a range with downside pressure, while USOUSD shows bullish structure above 100 despite short-term correction signals. Stocks and gold are pulling back slightly as bonds gain modestly.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin is about to dump 10%, warning of an incoming dump when certain conditions happen and a leverage trap at key level.

signals.name: US Oil
signals.reason: Price climbed above 100 in an ascending channel with higher highs/lows, maintaining bullish bias as long as above 100.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold is down alongside stocks and Bitcoin in today's session amid broader risk aversion.

signals.name: USD/BRL
signals.reason: Pair trades sideways in mid-range with cautious broad forex action ahead of potential volatility from Iranian tensions.

signals.name: S&P 500
signals.reason: Index pulling back 0.5% along with gold and Bitcoin as investors eye central bank meetings and geopolitics.

signals.name: Dogecoin
signals.reason: DOGE quietly builds higher lows above $0.09 while BTC consolidates in a range.

signals.name: WTI Crude
signals.reason: WTI holds above $99 per barrel supported by global supply uncertainty from stalled US-Iran talks.

signals.name: GBP/USD
signals.reason: British pound edges lower to $1.35 amid US-Iran impasse and domestic political pressures.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: No specific mentions today; inferred neutral aligned with BTC consolidation.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: Stocks broadly down including tech names amid risk aversion and French index decline signaling caution.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: Tech stocks pulling back with S&P 500 half percent decline in uncertain environment.
